title: Slow Roasted Australian Broccoli
description: A simple and healthy side dish that highlights the natural sweetness of broccoli. Roasting brings out the best in this Australian staple.
instructions: Rinse the broccoli and cut it into florets.
In a large bowl, toss the broccoli with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Transfer the broccoli to a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
